About Avalia Adventure

Born from a Passion
for the Wild

Avalia Adventure is a Tanzania-based safari company dedicated to delivering extraordinary wildlife experiences. We specialize in private, tailor-made safaris that connect you deeply with Africa's most iconic landscapes and animals.

From the endless plains of the Serengeti to the ancient caldera of Ngorongoro, every journey we create is designed with precision, care, and an uncompromising commitment to excellence.

🦁
Big Five Guaranteed
Expert guides know exactly where to look
🏕️
Luxury Camps
Premium tented lodges in the wild
✈️
Full Transfers
Airport pickups & private transport
🍽️
All Meals Included
Breakfast, lunch & dinner daily

Our Safari Packages

Handcrafted Journeys

View All
🌿

💚 Best Value

Budget Safari

An affordable yet unforgettable safari through Tanzania's iconic parks. Perfect for first-time visitors who want the real African experience without breaking the bank.

From $1,300 / person
3 Nights · 4 Days
🦒

👥 Group Adventure

Group Safari

Explore the Serengeti and Ngorongoro with friends or family in a shared private vehicle. A social, fun, and cost-effective way to experience Tanzania's wildlife.

From $1,600 / person
4 Nights · 5 Days
🌅

💑 Romantic Escape

Honeymoon Safari

A romantic private safari with luxury tented camps, candlelit dinners under the stars, and intimate game drives through Tanzania's most beautiful parks.

From $3,000 / couple
6 Nights · 7 Days
🦁

✨ Premium Experience

Luxury Safari

The ultimate Tanzania safari experience. Private guides, premium lodges, gourmet meals in the bush, and exclusive access to the most spectacular wildlife areas.

From $4,500 / person
6 Nights · 7 Days

Why Choose Us

The Avalia Difference

01
Expert Local Guides
Our guides are born and raised in Tanzania with over 10 years of field experience. They know every corner of the Serengeti.
02
100% Private Tours
We never mix groups. Your safari is exclusively yours — your pace, your itinerary, your experience.
03
Tailor-Made Itineraries
Every safari is designed from scratch around your interests, dates, budget, and travel style.
04
Luxury at Every Step
From your first transfer to your last dinner, we ensure premium comfort, service, and hospitality throughout.
05
Transparent Pricing
No hidden fees. What we quote is what you pay. Full inclusions clearly outlined before you book.
06
24/7 Support
Our team is available around the clock before and during your safari to ensure everything runs perfectly.

Guest Experience

Words from the Wild

★★★★★

"Avalia Adventure crafted a truly personal safari for us. Our guide knew every corner of the Serengeti — from the Great Migration to a quiet sunset at Ngorongoro. An experience we will never forget."
